day1_night_start.name: 私
day1_night_start.text: *家に帰ってきた。荷物もまだ全部片付けてないけど、ベッドに横になる。*

day1_night_2.name: 私
day1_night_2.text: *新しい学校、新しい人たち。みんな親切だった。いい学校みたいだ。*

day1_night_3.name: 私
day1_night_3.text: *初日にしては悪くなかった。うまくやっていけそうだ。*

day1_night_4.name: 私
day1_night_4.text: *New school. New classroom. New people. Everyone was friendlier than I expected. Somehow it feels like all the good people ended up at this school.*

day1_night_recall_sea.name: 私
day1_night_recall_sea.text: *セア……委員長だからって、初日からいろいろ世話を焼いてくれた。お弁当まで二人分。まめな子だ。*

day1_night_recall_eunsu.name: 私
day1_night_recall_eunsu.text: *先生は温かい人だった。転校生が来るのは久しぶりだって……この学校にはあまり来ないのかな。*

day1_night_recall_riin.name: 私
day1_night_recall_riin.text: *The school nurse Riin-sensei was easy to be around. Felt like an older sister.*

day1_night_recall_yuna.name: 私
day1_night_recall_yuna.text: *Yuna from the library... photography club junior. Shy, but her eyes lit up the moment she talked about cats. Cute.*

day1_night_5.name: 私
day1_night_5.text: *I lie down on the bed and stare at the ceiling. ...I think I can adapt. To this school.*

day1_night_phone.name: 私
day1_night_phone.text: *スマホを確認する。前の学校の友達から連絡が……ない。*

day1_night_phone_2.name: 私
day1_night_phone_2.text: *まあ、みんな忙しいんだろう。今度こっちから連絡しよう。*

day1_night_phone_3.name: 私
day1_night_phone_3.text: *Well, they might have still been in class. Everyone's probably busy.*

day1_night_phone_4.name: 私
day1_night_phone_4.text: *I also sent a direct message to my close friend Minsu — no reply either. He's usually quick to respond. ...It'll come tomorrow.*

day1_night_phone_6.name: 私
day1_night_phone_6.text: *Sea: 'Today was fun!' / Sea: 'What do you want in tomorrow's lunchbox?' / Sea: 'Taking requests lol'*

day1_night_phone_7.name: 私
day1_night_phone_7.text: *...She's already asking about tomorrow's lunch menu on the very first day. She really does care about people.*

day1_night_recall_seolhwa.name: 私
day1_night_recall_seolhwa.text: *あの後ろの席の女の子……名前は何だっけ？みんなほとんど気づいてないみたいだったけど……目が合った気がしたんだよな。*

day1_night_recall_seolhwa_yes.name: 私
day1_night_recall_seolhwa_yes.text: *Lee Seolhwa. Right. The guy next to me told me.*

day1_night_recall_seolhwa_yes_2.name: 私
day1_night_recall_seolhwa_yes_2.text: *They said everyone forgets she's even there because she has so little presence... but I'm pretty sure we made eye contact. ...I should try talking to her again tomorrow. We're in the same class — at least a proper hello.*

day1_night_recall_seolhwa_no.name: 私
day1_night_recall_seolhwa_no.text: *They said everyone forgets she's even there... but I'm pretty sure we made eye contact.*

day1_night_sleep.name: 私
day1_night_sleep.text: *布団をかぶる。明日はどんな一日になるだろう。*

day1_night_sleep_2.name: 私
day1_night_sleep_2.text: *……眠りに落ちる直前、窓の外で何かが光った気がした。……夢だろう。*

day1_night_sleep_3.name: 私
day1_night_sleep_3.text: *...Right before I drift off, something seems to flash outside the window. ...What was that? A streetlight?*
